CustomField.description: Formula field that concatenates the Related Contact name, a connector label, the Contact name, and the Type into a human-readable sentence. Recalculated automatically.
CustomField.formula: TEXT(RelatedContact__r.Salutation) + " " + RelatedContact__r.FirstName + " " + RelatedContact__r.LastName + " " + $Label.Relationship_Explanation_Connector + " " + TEXT(Contact__r.Salutation) + " " + Contact__r.FirstName + " " + Contact__r.LastName + "'s " + TEXT(Type__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: A read-only sentence describing the relationship, e.g. "Jane Smith is John Smith's Spouse."
CustomField.label: Relationship Explanation
